summary: Dashboard violates brand palette consistency rules by using generic dark neutral UI instead of the required diner aesthetic palette. The entire interface uses dark grays/blues instead of the mandated teal, cream, and ink colors.

violations.description: Logged-in dashboard surface uses generic dark palette (dark blue/gray sidebar, white main content) instead of sharing the diner brand palette required for public/authenticated UI coherence. Should use teal backgrounds, cream surfaces, and ink borders.
Dashboard uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of required diner palette surfaces. Primary canvas should use teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea, not white/gray neutrals.
Signed-in app chrome bleeds generic UI styling that visually separates from public marketing palette, violating the requirement that both systems remain coherent.

actions: Apply diner palette to dashboard: replace dark sidebar with cream #fff8ea surfaces and ink #1f1b18 borders
Convert main content area to use teal #9fd8d2 or cream backgrounds instead of white/gray
Update progress bars and accent colors to use gold #f6c15b and other diner palette colors
Ensure hard shadows and borders follow diner aesthetic (2px-4px ink borders, hard offset shadows)
